globalHeaders.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; base-uri 'self'; font-src 'self' https: data:; form-action 'self'; frame-ancestors 'self'; img-src * data:; object-src 'none'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src-attr 'none'; style-src 'self' https: 'unsafe-inline'; upgrade-insecure-requests; frame-src https://www.youtube.com/embed/;
